title: Narkaa
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Narkaa''' were an aquatic predatory creature native to the seas of [[Rathalay]]. Narkaa also had sharp [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]].<ref name="Shield of Lies">''[[Shield of Lies]]''</ref>

{{Creature-stub}}
